channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Australia to send missiles to UAE, surveillance plane to help Gulf defence
item.description: Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese said missiles and reconnaissance plane will be sent to region.

item.title: Trump claims Iran planned to ‘take over Middle East’ before US attacked
item.description: US President Donald Trump cites “information and belief” for his claim that Iran would have taken over the Middle East.

item.title: Trump says some sanctions to be lifted on oil producers amid Iran war
item.description: Crude oil prices plunge below $90 a barrel following an earlier surge to almost $120 in price swing over 24 hours.

item.title: Iran says no future negotiations with US after ‘bitter experience’
item.description: Iran’s Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi told PBS News that talking or negotiating with the US is no longer on the agenda.

item.title: Trump threatens to hit Iran harder if it blocks energy supplies
item.description: US President Donald Trump threatened to escalate attacks on Iran if it disrupted global oil supplies.

item.title: Iran war may end ‘pretty quickly’: What Trump told Republicans
item.description: US president highlighted what he described as the successes of Operation Epic Fury against Iran in his latest speech.

item.title: ‘No middle ground’: Israelis back Iran war, despite taking mounting hits
item.description: Most Israelis back war, a poll suggests, as genocidal rhetoric returns, and opponents face threats and violence.

item.title: Iranians rally to welcome Mojtaba Khamenei as new supreme leader
item.description: Some Iranians took to the streets of downtown Tehran to show their support for Mojtaba Khamenei as new supreme leader.

item.title: Iran war live: Trump says conflict will be over soon; Gulf attacks continue
item.description: US-Israeli strikes on Tehran continue as Iranian counterattacks target Bahrain, Kuwait and Saudi Arabia.

item.title: Trump says US-Israeli war on Iran will be over ‘very soon’
item.description: US president speaks in Florida after a call with Putin, who said he wanted to be 'helpful' on Middle East war.
